text:
In the first scene, a quiet emptiness engulfs me: the sterile white of the corridor, the harsh lines and angles, the slight disorientation of a tilted view. It is a space paused between movement and meaning, evoking a sense of anticipation, and perhaps a hint of unease.

Entering the next space, my feeling shifts. Color and text leap out, the graphic patterns of R+D on the wall pulling me forward into a world of ideas and creative tension. Here, curiosity stirs—this place wants to teach me, to provoke reflection about innovation and our relationship with machines. I find myself ready to question and engage.
